directive: Build a Go module named 'stack'. FIRST run 'go mod init stack' at the repo root to create go.mod, so 'go build ./...' works. Then implement package stack in stack.go at the module root: a LIFO stack of ints with New, Push, Pop, Peek, Len; Pop and Peek return an error when empty. Add table-driven tests in stack_test.go. Make 'go build ./...' and 'go test ./...' both pass from the root.
